suppressedMessages.message: React Hook useEffect has a missing dependency: 'error'. Either include it or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [mode, username, password, error]

suppressedMessages.message: Do not use "@ts-nocheck" because it alters compilation errors.
Unexpected any. Specify a different type.

suggestions.desc: Use `unknown` instead, this will force you to explicitly, and safely assert the type is correct.
Use `never` instead, this is useful when instantiating generic type parameters that you don't need to know the type of.

messages.message: Fast refresh only works when a file only exports components. Move your component(s) to a separate file.
React Hook "useMemo" is called conditionally. React Hooks must be called in the exact same order in every component render.
React Hook "useMemo" is called conditionally. React Hooks must be called in the exact same order in every component render. Did you accidentally call a React Hook after an early return?
React Hook useMemo has a missing dependency: 'runByDomain'. Either include it or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [summaryQuery.data?.domains, runByDomain]

messages.message: The 'triangleCells' logical expression could make the dependencies of useMemo Hook (at line 64) change on every render. To fix this, wrap the initialization of 'triangleCells' in its own useMemo() Hook.
